name: Bulgur with Buried Treasure
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the lamb meat in butter until cooked through.
2. Remove the lamb and set aside.
3. Sauté the onions in the remaining butter until pale-yellow.
4. Return the lamb to the skillet with the sautéed onions.
5. Add water and soaked garbanzos; cook until both are tender.
6. Set some of the meat and onions aside.
7. Add bulgur to the skillet, cooking over low heat until done.
8. Return the meat, onions, and garbanzos to the skillet.
9. Stir in the remaining butter, salt, and cinnamon.
10. Serve with yogurt.
